problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
